requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规／生产者责任
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規／生產者責任

summary.en: Mauritius does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation comparable to Regulation （EU） 2023/1542. There is no battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or pan-market extended-producer-responsibility （EPR） registration applied specifically to lithium batteries as a horizontal regime. Lithium batteries and power banks instead enter through general product-safety, standards-conformity, and import-control channels administered by the Mauritius Standards Bureau （MSB） and customs, supported by environmental and waste rules of general application rather than a dedicated battery passport scheme. Exporters should confirm current scope directly with MSB and the importer, as Mauritius periodically adopts MS standards that mirror IEC and may expand regulated categories.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯不实行与法规（EU）2023/1542相当的欧盟式横向电池法规。没有针对锂电池作为横向制度专门适用的电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或全市场延伸生产者责任（EPR）注册。锂电池和移动电源转而通过毛里求斯标准局（MSB）及海关管理的一般产品安全、标准合格评定和进口管制渠道进入，并辅以普遍适用的环境与废弃物规则，而非专门的电池护照方案。出口商应直接向MSB及进口商确认当前适用范围，因毛里求斯会定期采纳对照IEC的MS标准并可能扩大受监管类别。
summary.zht: 模里西斯不實行與法規（EU）2023/1542相當的歐盟式橫向電池法規。沒有針對鋰電池作為橫向制度專門適用的電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或全市場延伸生產者責任（EPR）登記。鋰電池和行動電源轉而透過模里西斯標準局（MSB）及海關管理的一般產品安全、標準合格評定和進口管制渠道進入，並輔以普遍適用的環境與廢棄物規則，而非專門的電池護照方案。出口商應直接向MSB及進口商確認當前適用範圍，因模里西斯會定期採納對照IEC的MS標準並可能擴大受監管類別。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius Standards Bureau Act — MSB mandate to set MS standards and operate conformity/import inspection
Consumer Protection （Control of Imports） framework administered with MSB and Mauritius Revenue Authority Customs
No dedicated horizontal lithium-battery regulation equivalent to Regulation （EU） 2023/1542

summary.en: China regulates portable lithium batteries primarily through the mandatory product-safety standard GB 31241-2022 and, for relevant finished products, CCC （China Compulsory Certification）. China does not impose an EU-style battery passport or carbon-footprint declaration on exported portable batteries, though domestic waste-battery and producer-responsibility rules exist under environmental law. A GB 31241 report or CCC certificate evidences Chinese domestic compliance but is not a Mauritius market-access instrument and is not, by itself, recognised by MSB conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过强制性产品安全标准GB 31241-2022，以及对相关成品的CCC（中国强制性产品认证）来监管便携式锂电池。中国未对出口便携式电池施加欧盟式电池护照或碳足迹声明，但环境法下存在国内废电池与生产者责任规定。GB 31241报告或CCC证书证明中国国内合规，但不是毛里求斯市场准入工具，本身也不被MSB合格评定认可。
summary.zht: 中國主要透過強制性產品安全標準GB 31241-2022，以及對相關成品的CCC（中國強制性產品認證）來監管便攜式鋰電池。中國未對出口便攜式電池施加歐盟式電池護照或碳足跡聲明，但環境法下存在國內廢電池與生產者責任規定。GB 31241報告或CCC證書證明中國國內合規，但不是模里西斯市場准入工具，本身也不被MSB合格評定認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
CCC （China Compulsory Certification） where the finished product falls within the CCC catalogue

gap.en: The key structural difference: Mauritius has no horizontal battery regulation, so there is no battery passport, recycled-content, or EPR-registration burden of the EU type to satisfy. The exporter burden shifts to （1） meeting MSB standards conformity and import inspection where the product category is regulated, and （2） routing through a Mauritian importer who assumes local responsibilities. A Chinese GB 31241 report demonstrates engineering safety but does not establish MSB conformity. Exporters should confirm with MSB whether the specific product is in a regulated/inspected category and what conformity evidence （test reports to MS/IEC standards） MSB accepts.
gap.zh: 关键结构性差异：毛里求斯没有横向电池法规，因此无需满足欧盟式的电池护照、再生材料含量或EPR注册负担。出口商负担转向（1）在产品类别受监管时满足MSB标准合格评定与进口检验，（2）通过承担当地责任的毛里求斯进口商运作。中国GB 31241报告证明工程安全，但不构成MSB合格评定。出口商应向MSB确认具体产品是否属于受监管/受检验类别，以及MSB接受何种合格评定证据（依MS/IEC标准的测试报告）。
gap.zht: 關鍵結構性差異：模里西斯沒有橫向電池法規，因此無需滿足歐盟式的電池護照、再生材料含量或EPR登記負擔。出口商負擔轉向（1）在產品類別受監管時滿足MSB標準合格評定與進口檢驗，（2）透過承擔當地責任的模里西斯進口商運作。中國GB 31241報告證明工程安全，但不構成MSB合格評定。出口商應向MSB確認具體產品是否屬於受監管/受檢驗類別，以及MSB接受何種合格評定證據（依MS/IEC標準的測試報告）。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style horizontal battery regulation in Mauritius; market access is governed by MSB standards conformity / import inspection （scope-dependent） plus general import-control law, not a dedicated battery passport or EPR regime
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China; CCC where the finished product is catalogue-listed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius does not impose an EU-style horizontal battery regulation （no battery passport, recycled-content, or EPR registration of the EU type）. Market access instead depends on MSB standards conformity and import inspection where the product category is regulated, plus routing through a local importer. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documents evidence Chinese compliance only and do not by themselves establish Mauritius conformity; confirm the current regulated scope and accepted evidence directly with MSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯不施加欧盟式横向电池法规（无欧盟式电池护照、再生材料含量或EPR注册）。市场准入转而取决于产品类别受监管时的MSB标准合格评定与进口检验，并通过当地进口商运作。中国GB 31241或CCC文件仅证明中国合规，本身不构成毛里求斯合格评定；请直接向MSB确认当前受监管范围及可接受证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯不施加歐盟式橫向電池法規（無歐盟式電池護照、再生材料含量或EPR登記）。市場准入轉而取決於產品類別受監管時的MSB標準合格評定與進口檢驗，並透過當地進口商運作。中國GB 31241或CCC文件僅證明中國合規，本身不構成模里西斯合格評定；請直接向MSB確認當前受監管範圍及可接受證據。
